title: Warm Circuit River
prompt: Create an original Korean R&B track at 78 BPM in F minor, clean and public-safe. Groove: a polished Korean R&B groove with soft bounce. Drums: gentle kick, crisp rim snare, brushed hats, snaps. Bass: stay smooth and melodic, supporting lush chords. Instruments: electric piano, glassy synth bells, chorus guitar, airy pads; add original samples like original breathy vocal chops, reverse pads. Vocal texture: silky lead texture with airy harmonies, delicate runs; no lyric writing, violence, hate, or explicit content. Structure: intro, verse/section A, pre-chorus/build, chorus/drop, bridge/breakdown, final lift, outro. Build adds additional percussion, harmony doubles, chorus brings a memorable clean hook, fuller drums, bridge uses stripped drums, bass pauses. Production: warm saturation, subtle stereo movement. Mix/master: clean loudness, controlled sub, smooth highs.
exclude: specific artist references, copyrighted melodies, copied K-R&B hooks, idol-pop chants, explicit lyrics, harsh autotune, EDM drop, trap clutter, muddy pads, brittle highs
